					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 59 MB</p>
<p>YEAR TWO OF THE ULTIMATE UNIVERSE NEARS ITS END IN THE FINAL ISSUE OF ULTIMATES! She-Hulk and her remaining teammates confront the villainous Hulk in a brutal, all-or-nothing battle on Gamma Island!</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/the-ultimates-24-2026/">The Ultimates #24 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>

<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp13="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Ultimate Impact – Reborn #1 (2026)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-impact-reborn-1-2026/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-impact-reborn-1-2026/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Wed, 20 May 2026 14:28:31 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Marvel Comics</category>
		<category>0-Day</category>
		<category>Ultimate Impact</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 49 MB</p>
<p>THE ULTIMATE UNIVERSE'S LEGACY LIVES ON! MILES MORALES returned from the Ultimate Universe with a plan: safeguard the ORIGIN BOXES — catalysts for the creation of new super heroes — before they fall into the wrong hands! But the secret is out as Miles' battle over the boxes engulfs the entire Marvel U! This May, Chris Condon (ULTIMATE WOLVERINE) and Stefano Caselli (ULTIMATE BLACK PANTHER) team up to create stunning and unforgettable new characters on both sides of a conflict that will shape the future of the 616!</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-impact-reborn-1-2026/">Ultimate Impact &#8211; Reborn #1 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>

			<slash:comments>0</slash:comments>

<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 47 MB</p>
<p>SPIDER-MAN MEETS HIS MAKER! Time is ticking on the Ultimate Universe!!! In this penultimate issue of the most climactic super-hero event EVER(!)... heroes will fall, villains will rise and your favorite characters will be forced to make difficult sacrifices!</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/ultimate-endgame-4-2026/">Ultimate Endgame #4 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
